system.description: When played by a competent musician (Carouse 1 or Craft 1), this instrument will inspire all who hear it to feel a powerful emotion as determined by the musician playing it (who is immune). Those hearing the emotion will act in accordance with their feelings. They get an INT 10+ throw to avoid harming those their friends and family but are otherwise in thrall to the Lyre's power. The effects last until the music stops.
